refined_caption: The hospital nursing station is empty and unstaffed, with rows of chairs available for patients and visitors. There are no medical staff present at the station.
complaint_description: I visited the hospital and was concerned to find the nursing station completely empty and unstaffed. I had to wait for a long time to get assistance, which delayed my treatment. This lack of staff is unacceptable and affects the quality of care.
voice_text: I went to the hospital and the nursing station was empty, nobody was there to help me, it was really frustrating.
